commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR batches dirty memory and session files into source-wide embedding batches for opted-in runtimes, adds OpenAI/Gemini/Voyage/OpenAI-compatible opt-ins, preserves unopted per-file runtime batching, and expands tests around the memory indexing path.

PR surface: Source +508, Tests +337. Total +845 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main clearly schedules memory and session indexing per file and calls batchEmbed from indexFile, matching the linked report's file-boundary batching behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the OpenAI-compatible timing bug and add a regression test; maintainer API acceptance remains a merge-risk decision.

target.title: perf(memory): batch memory embeddings across files
